mapper.sql: cont_id AS contId, cont_name AS contName, organizer AS organizer, deadline AS deadline, logo_img AS logoImg, site_url AS siteUrl, category AS category, createdate AS createdate
mapper.select: SELECT cont_id AS contId, cont_name AS contName, organizer AS organizer, deadline AS deadline, logo_img AS logoImg, site_url AS siteUrl, category AS category, createdate AS createdate FROM contest ORDER BY deadline ASC

SELECT cont_id AS contId, cont_name AS contName, organizer, deadline, logo_img AS logoImg, site_url AS siteUrl, category, createdate FROM contest ORDER BY deadline ASC NULLS LAST FETCH FIRST 6 ROWS ONLY
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM contest WHERE category IS NOT NULL ORDER BY category

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contest
(cont_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR organizer LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND category = #{category}
AND deadline >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_ING (ING_ID, USER_ID, TARGET_ID, TARGET_TYPE, STATUS) VALUES (USER_ING_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{param1}, #{param2}, #{param3}, 0)
